title: ExposoGraph 3.0 Ontology Class (Phase 2 — tightened)
description: Schema for a single entity class record within data/ontology/classes.json entity_classes array.

class_id.description: Unique identifier for this ontology class.

parent.description: Parent class_id. Null only for the root class (Entity).

abstract.description: True if this is an abstract class (no direct instances in the registry).

maps_to_registry_type.description: The registry node entity_type value this class governs, or null.

identifier_namespaces.description: External identifier systems relevant to this class (e.g. CHEBI, UniProt, HGNC).
